operatingModel.mission: A generic reference operating brief — replace with your own. Example: reach a validated path to recurring revenue through focused product iteration and a repeatable acquisition motion.
operatingModel.primaryMetric: Net Value Acceleration — did our actions reduce time-to-value?

portfolioCommunication.unifiedMessage: The one core message every brand in your portfolio shares — replace with your own.

The role this brand plays in the unified story.

communicationRules: Reference the parent organization when useful.
